definitions.text: To make a non-linear physical movement. To move about an axis through itself.
To move about an axis through itself.
To change the direction or orientation of, especially by rotation.
A change of direction or orientation.
examples: Give the handle a turn, then pull it.

definitions.text: A movement of an object about its own axis in one direction that continues until the object returns to its initial orientation. A unit of plane angle measurement based on this movement.
